boxDescription: The power distribution box is in the engine compartment. It has high-current fuses that protect your vehicle's main electrical systems from overloads.

fuses.description: Power windows, Electrochromic mirror, Power door locks.
Electronic control panel, Gateway module, Gear shift module [GT500].
Steering column control module, Instrument cluster.
Ambient lighting module [base], Auxiliary body module.
Right-hand front-window motor (power distribution module), Passenger door control unit.

boxDescription: The fuse panel is in the right-hand side of the passenger footwell behind a trim panel and plastic key code card.
